headline: New App Turns Your Life Into a Sitcom Complete With Laugh Track
summary: Awkward moments now come with studio audience approval ratings.
fullBody: LaughTrack AI analyzes your conversations and adds canned laughter, applause, or awkward silence. Users report feeling like they're in a 90s comedy. One man proposed via the app and received a standing ovation from virtual friends. Privacy concerns have been drowned out by roaring laughter.
